name: Repay Holdings Corp
business: Repay Holdings Corporation is a payments technology company that provides integrated payment processing solutions to industry-oriented vertical markets including personal loans, automotive loans, receivables management, and business-to-business. It operates through two segments: Consumer Payments and Business Payments. The company's solutions include debit/credit card processing, ACH processing, virtual credit card processing, and accounts payable automation.

exposures.sentence: We provide integrated payment processing solutions to industry-oriented vertical markets in which businesses or other organizations have specific transaction processing needs.

catalysts.event: Borrowed $110.0 million under revolving credit facility
catalysts.sentence: On January 26, 2026, we borrowed $110.0 million under our revolving credit facility pursuant to the Second Amended Credit Agreement.

On or about February 2, 2026, we repaid $146.5 million of the remaining aggregate principal amount of the 2026 Notes using the $110.0 million borrowing under the revolving credit facility and approximately $36.5 million of cash on hand.

catalysts.event: Board approved increase in share repurchase program to $75 million
catalysts.sentence: On May 8, 2025, our board of directors approved the increase of its authorized Share Repurchase Program to up to $75 million.
